headline: National Duals Invitational Announces Additional Qualifiers
summary: OKLAHOMA CITY, April 01, 2026--The National Duals Invitational, a groundbreaking $1 million collegiate wrestling event sponsored by Paycom, has announced that six additional teams have earned automatic qualification for the 2026 tournament. Featuring top programs from across the country, the tournament will bring elite competition and high-stakes prize money to Tulsa this December.
